arts.ttl: Real Madrid furious with Barcelona and Atlético Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid are furious that LaLiga has scheduled their game against Villarreal on matchday 28 for 6:30 p.m. local time (12:30 p.m. ET) on Saturday, March 15, giving them what they feel is a considerable disadvantage in the title race in Spain. Due to LaLiga’s scheduling, Ancelotti’s team will head to Villarreal with only two days of rest after the grueling European match, and on top of that, they’ll play at 6:30 p.m.

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Lionel Messi 'getting closer' to sensational Camp Nou return
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly looking at a scenario where they can re-sign Inter Miami forward Lionel Messi later in 2025.

arts.ttl: Yamal named in Barça squad for Atleti 1st leg
arts.sum: Szczesny; Kounde, Araujo, Cubarsí, Balde; De Jong, Pedri; Yamal, Olmo, Raphinha; Lewandowski Lamine Yamal has recovered in time from the foot injury he suffered in the weekend win over Las Palmas and has been named in the 22-man squad for Tuesday’s Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against Atlético Madrid.
